title: Particle Tweaks
body:
Particles in Minecraft have always simply popped in and out of existence, and have always lacked a coat of paint that some people might've wanted.

This mod fixes that, now making almost all particles grow/fade into existence, and shrink/fade out of existence!
On top of that, some particles are now effected by water.

Bubbles will also finally pop instead of vanishing, too!

[![Use code FROZENBLOCK with Kinetic Hosting for 15% off your first month!](https://i.imgur.com/9ZfqfCq.png)](https://tinyurl.com/3xhmk7fb)
